feedback_summary:
- BDD oracle absent signal: 0 BDD scenarios executed. Feature file exists (features/storage-substrate/storage-substrate.feature) but pytest-bdd is not installed in the worktree environment. Error: 'pytest_bdd_not_importable: tagged feature files exist for TASK-MEM-009 but pytest-bdd is not installed'. This prevents BDD-based verification of acceptance criteria.: Install pytest-bdd>=8.1,<9 in pyproject.toml dependencies and re-run the task to enable BDD verification
- Honesty verification found 2 should_fix discrepancies: Player claimed files tests/unit/test_settings.py and tests/unit/test_store_validation.py but git status shows no changes to these files this turn. These files are referenced as evidence for AC-003 (Settings ValidationError) and AC-004 (suite coverage).: Clarify which tests were created this turn vs. pre-existing. If tests already existed, explain why these ACs were in scope. Remove unmodified files from completion artifacts or provide evidence they were verified.
- Independent test verification was skipped for this testing task. While quality_gates.tests_passed=true, there is no independent verification that 'python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v --timeout=30' passes hermetically with env vars unset (AC-001).: Provide independent verification of hermetic test execution, or explain why Player's self-report is sufficient for a task about creating tests
... and 1 more issues
